parameters:
The Legendary Tree... It says that if you propose
under this tree and become united, you'll be a happily
married couple forever.

The Legendary Tree... It says that if you propose
under this tree and get married, you'll become
eternally happy spouses.

1... Possess a wedding dress 2... Reserve a ceremony
at the church 3... Bond level is 5

The legendary tree... It says that if you propose
under this tree and become united, you'll become
eternally happy spouses.

Look! There's a magnificent tree. Let's go a little
closer.

The legendary tree... It says that if you propose
under this tree and get married, you'll become a
happily married couple forever.

Wow... a legendary tree... How romantic~ I'm getting
all dreamy~\i[12]
(It reminds me of the galge I used to play...)
Need a sickle... Let's make it at the workbench.
Need a sickle... Let's make it at the workbench.
Need a sickle... Let's make it at the workbench.

There's a delicious-looking fruit with a rich,
fragrant aroma... (＊One of the pregnancy condition
events, recommend making a separate save)

Picked a fruit from the legendary tree and gave it to
Mother...

Mmm~ What a lovely smell! It looks like an apple...
Probably safe to eat as is, right?♪
Huh... If it's that delicious, let me have a bite too.
Let me have a bite too...
Crunch... munch munch... Crunch... munch munch...

Mother is eating the fruit as if possessed. She
doesn't seem to hear me at all...
She's eating it all by herself... Even the core...

Mother lets out a painful groan... Maybe it was
poisonous. I frantically search through my belongings
for medicinal herbs.
Mother suddenly starts taking off her clothes...
Whoa...!? Why are you taking off your clothes...!?

My body feels so hot... haa... haa... Hey... let's
have sex...\i[12] Sex\i[12]Sex\i[12]

It hurts down there, I feel like I'm going crazy...
Use your son's dick to stir up mommy's pussy...\i[12]

(Ah... I see, so this is the fruit's side effect. It
makes animals go into heat.)

Decided to enjoy making a baby with my aroused mother
while I had the chance!

(From the looks of it, Mother might have come back to
her senses...)

Mother had no memory of being in heat, so I carefully
explained what happened...

Thanks to the fruit of life's effect, Risa's body has
rejuvenated, making her much more fertile.

Give-me fairy "Give me, give me, beginner potion, give
me"

Give-me fairy "Yay! Thank you! I'll give you this in
return!"
(A bone...!? What am I supposed to do with this...!?)
The give-me fairy went away somewhere
You don't have a beginner potion
I need a scythe... Let's make it at the workbench.

This one has too little wool, let's find another
sheep.

I think I'll propose to Mom... (Since the mother-son
relationship will change, a separate save is
recommended.)
What? What are you talking about...

U...uh...well... (Crap...I'm so nervous my voice is
shaking...)
Um...there's something I want to tell you, Mom...

I've loved you since I was a kid...but I thought I had
to give up because we're mother and son...

But in this world, we can be husband and wife without
anyone blaming us...

(\V[3] is making such a serious face...his body is
shaking a little. Of course he's nervous...I need to
respond properly...)

Hehe...thank you, \V[3]... But if we're going to be
husband and wife, I'd like you to call me by my
name\i[12]
\{Risa...! I love you...! Have my baby!\}

Even though I'm your mother...please let me be your
bride...\i[12]

Um...I definitely want to have \V[3]'s baby
too...\i[12]

(I'm sorry, you in heaven...I'm going to live as
husband and wife with my son in this world...)
And so, Mom accepted my proposal...

Ahead is written "\V[3] and Risa's house". It's
something the orcs prepared for us.

Speaking of which, since we defeated the Red Dragon,
we can now enter the adventurer's town...
Maybe we should take a little detour...?

Wow...! I had no idea there was a town here... Let's
ask around and hear some stories.

Huh...? But looking closely, it seems like none of the
townspeople are human...
